featureType.name: taxon_per_quadrant_green
featureType.title: taxon_per_quadrant_green
featureType.nativeCRS: GEOGCS["WGS 84", DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984", SPHEROID["WGS 84", 6378137.0, 298.257223563, AUTHORITY["EPSG","7030"]], AUTHORITY["EPSG","6326"]], PRIMEM["Greenwich", 0.0, AUTHORITY["EPSG","8901"]], UNIT["degree", 0.017453292519943295], AXIS["Geodetic longitude", EAST], AXIS["Geodetic latitude", NORTH], AUTHORITY["EPSG","4326"]]

virtualTable.name: taxon_per_quadrant_green
virtualTable.sql: SELECT q.id, max(r.validation_status) AS max_valid_status, q.geom_wgs FROM geodata.quadrants_full q JOIN atlas.records r ON ST_Within(r.coords_wgs, q.geom_wgs) JOIN atlas.record_validation_status as status ON (r.validation_status=status.id ) WHERE r.taxon_id = %TAXON_ID% AND r.validation_status=3 GROUP BY q.id
